case_title: WELLS, KAY A. vs. BAY ROSE, LTD., FORMERLY KNOWN AS THE A.CAL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS, KAY A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY ROSE, LTD., FORMERLY KNOWN AS THE A.CAL ROSSI COMPANY LTD., WHICH WAS FORMERLY KNOWN AS   STANFORD COURT DEVELOPMENT CO., INC. $1,735.43 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,815.43

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS, KAY A. AS TO DEFENDANT BAY ROSE, LTD., FORMERLY KNOWN AS THE A.CAL ROSSI COMPANY LTD., WHICH WAS FORMERLY KNOWN AS   STANFORD COURT DEVELOPMENT CO., INC.
